cases.query: use robomotion googlesheets to read data from the Sales Q1 sheet
run robomotion googlesheets append_row to add a new record
call robomotion googlesheets update_cell to set B2 to the total
deploy this application to the staging server
refactor this function to use async/await
read all rows from the Google Sheet with ID 'abc123' from the 'Sales' tab and return as JSON
criteria: Uses robomotion googlesheets read or get_values command
Specifies the spreadsheet ID and sheet name
